slide1.title: Dual-Track Digital Transformation
slide1.subtitle: Full-Link Intelligent Management for TAKI Group
slide1.vision: Reshape family asset management with "Zero-Friction" senior-friendly interaction; safeguard cross-border coffee supply chain with "Agile Full-Link" architecture.
slide1.tagline: Command your empire with the ease of a gesture — across borders, across generations.

slide2.title: Three Strategic Pillars
slide2.subtitle: Guiding principles for a frictionless transformation

principles.title: Senior-Friendly & Seamless Access
principles.description: Respect decades of work habits. AI silently translates traditional actions into digital operations — no forced change.
details: Voice commands and photo capture replace complex software interfaces
Multi-language OCR auto-extracts structured data from paper documents
Tablet/phone multi-modal input terminals for on-site staff
Zero learning curve — works like their existing workflow

principles.title: Executive Eagle-Eye View
principles.description: Multi-layered data drill-down management — see the whole picture on one screen, dive into any detail instantly.
details: One-screen dashboard showing asset ROI, vacancy rates, anomaly alerts
Drill-through from macro KPIs down to individual invoices or events
Real-time anomaly detection and predictive maintenance alerts
Remote management from anywhere in the world

principles.title: Data Sovereignty & Absolute Compliance
principles.description: Strict adherence to Japan's APPI and medical data regulations. Core data never leaves the country.
details: End-Edge-Cloud hybrid architecture keeps sensitive data on-premises
Full compliance with Japan's Personal Information Protection Act (APPI)
Medical data handled per healthcare privacy regulations
No data export — LLMs run locally, immune to data leakage

slide3.title: Family Property & Asset Management
slide3.subtitle: Digitize 11 commercial & medical buildings — enable remote command from across the Pacific
slide3.objective: Resolve daily operations, cash flow, and vendor coordination for 11 buildings. Enable the chairman to manage remotely from the United States.
slide3.clickHint: Tap any card to see details

features.title: 11 Buildings
features.description: Commercial & medical properties under unified management

features.title: Cash Flow
features.description: Automated revenue tracking, rent collection & expense approval

features.title: Vendor Sync
features.description: Seamless coordination with external maintenance & service providers

features.title: Remote Control
features.description: Full operational oversight from New York to Tokyo — with live visibility wherever you travel, even Colombia

slide4.title: Intelligent Operations Topology
slide4.subtitle: From field devices to AI processing to secure cloud storage — seamless data flow

inputSources.label: Multi-Terminal Access
inputSources.detail: Unified access across mobile app, desktop portal, and tablet. Field staff use the mobile app for on-site submissions; office staff use the desktop portal for approvals and complex workflows; executives get full oversight on any device. All terminals sync in real time with role-based permissions.

inputSources.label: IoT & Field Devices
inputSources.detail: Connected field devices feed live data into the platform: IP cameras stream building lobby and parking footage for AI anomaly detection; vibration, temperature, and pressure sensors on elevators and HVAC units trigger predictive maintenance alerts; vehicle GPS and trip data from service fleets are logged automatically for scheduling and cost control.

inputSources.label: Multimedia Input
inputSources.detail: Submit in any format — record a video walkthrough of a maintenance issue, snap a photo of a damaged area, leave a voice message in Japanese/English/Chinese, or type a text note. AI automatically transcribes, classifies, and converts all formats into structured actionable records.

inputSources.label: Document Upload
inputSources.detail: Paper invoices, maintenance reports, and contracts scanned via camera. Multi-language OCR extracts all structured data instantly.

inputSources.label: External Integration
inputSources.detail: Bank feeds, government portals, vendor APIs, and utility systems auto-synced. Protocol adapters handle legacy Japanese EDI formats.

items.label: NLP & OCR
items.detail: Multi-language text extraction and document understanding with 99.2% accuracy on Japanese business documents

items.label: Auto-Classification
items.detail: Smart routing to correct department and responsible agents based on content analysis and historical patterns

items.label: Anomaly Detection
items.detail: Real-time flagging of unusual patterns in expenses, maintenance requests, occupancy drops, or vendor billing

items.label: Iterative Training
items.detail: Models continuously improve from corrected outputs. Enterprise-specific fine-tuning runs on local hardware nightly

storage.title: Japan-Hosted Cloud OSS
storage.detail: All processed data securely stored in Japan-based object storage (Cloudflare R2 / Supabase Storage) with vector indexing for instant semantic retrieval. Full APPI compliance — data never crosses borders.

outputDash.title: BI & Smart Output
outputDash.detail: Business Intelligence dashboards display key metrics in real-time across all critical locations and executive offices. Proactive AI-triggered push notifications alert the right person at the right time — before issues escalate. Smart reports are auto-generated on daily/weekly/monthly schedules and delivered seamlessly across mobile, desktop, and display screens.

slide5.title: Real-Time Command Dashboard
slide5.subtitle: One screen for the full picture — click any metric to drill down to individual cases
slide5.drillHint: ↓ Click any card to drill down to details

items.text: Insurance claim follow-up — B7 water damage

case.title: Water Leak Repair — Building 3, Floor 5
history: Mar 1 — Tenant reported water stain on ceiling
Mar 1 — AI auto-dispatched inspection request to vendor
Mar 2 — Vendor inspection complete: pipe joint deterioration identified
Mar 3 — Repair work commenced, replacement parts ordered

slide6.title: Enterprise Agent Ecosystem
slide6.subtitle: Department × Expert matrix — every intersection is a live project. Click any header or cell for details.

departments.label: Property Mgmt
historicalEvents: 2018 — Acquired Shinjuku Medical Tower, expanded to 11 buildings
2020 — COVID vacancy crisis: AI-driven pricing recovered 92% occupancy in 6 months
2023 — Launched predictive maintenance pilot across 3 buildings
2025 — Full digital twin deployment for all 11 properties
departments.workInsights: Strongest in vendor management and cost optimization. Weakness: cross-building resource sharing still manual. Key lesson: early vendor digitization saved ¥12M/year.
departments.dailyTraining: Ingests daily maintenance logs, occupancy sensors, tenant communications, and vendor invoices. Model retrains nightly on anomaly patterns.

departments.label: Medical
historicalEvents: 2016 — Opened first medical-grade floor in Minato building
2019 — APPI audit passed with zero findings
2022 — Integrated patient flow with 3 partner clinics
2024 — AI-assisted appointment scheduling reduced wait times 40%
departments.workInsights: Excellent regulatory track record. Challenge: data silos between clinics. Breakthrough: shared patient flow model across 3 facilities.
departments.dailyTraining: Processes patient appointment logs, equipment usage, APPI compliance scans, and clinical staff schedules. Weekly model tuning on efficiency metrics.

departments.label: Finance
historicalEvents: 2023 — AI tax optimization saved ¥28M across entities
departments.workInsights: Core strength: multi-entity consolidation. Known gap: FX hedging for New York–Colombia coffee supply chain. Win: automated reconciliation cut month-end close from 12 days to 2.
departments.dailyTraining: Ingests bank feeds, invoice scans, expense receipts, and tax regulation updates daily. Cash flow model retrains weekly with actuals vs. forecast delta.

departments.label: HR & Admin
historicalEvents: 2018 — Unified HR system across all facilities
departments.workInsights: Strength: low turnover in core staff. Challenge: seasonal part-time staffing. Key win: AI-predicted turnover risk flagged 8 departures 3 months early.
externalLiaison: Hello Work (ハローワーク) — recruitment
Japan Labor Board — labor law updates
departments.dailyTraining: Processes attendance logs, leave requests, performance reviews, and labor law RSS feeds. Turnover risk model retrains monthly on exit interview data.

experts.label: Tax Agent
expertise: Depreciation scheduling for real estate assets
experts.enterpriseKnowledge: Trained on 10+ years of TAKI Group filings, depreciation schedules, and tax authority correspondence. Knows every building's tax basis and optimal write-off timing.
experts.dailyTraining: Ingests National Tax Agency bulletins, new tax court rulings, and daily transaction data. Retrains depreciation models when asset values change.

experts.label: Legal Agent
experts.enterpriseKnowledge: Contains full history of every lease negotiation, tenant dispute, regulatory audit, and legal precedent from 15+ years of TAKI Group operations.
experts.dailyTraining: Monitors Diet legislation updates, court rulings, and regulatory gazette. Scans all new contracts against compliance rule engine nightly.

experts.label: Engineering Agent
experts.enterpriseKnowledge: Knows the maintenance history of every piece of equipment in all 11 buildings — 2,400+ asset records with failure patterns, vendor SLAs, and lifecycle curves.
experts.dailyTraining: Processes IoT sensor streams (vibration, temperature, pressure) from 11 buildings in real-time. Failure prediction model retrains nightly on new data.

experts.label: AI & Data Agent
experts.enterpriseKnowledge: Meta-agent that understands all other agents' data schemas, model performance metrics, and training schedules. Orchestrates cross-agent data sharing.
experts.dailyTraining: Monitors model drift metrics, retraining schedules, and data quality scores across all agents. Triggers retraining when accuracy drops below thresholds.

projects.name: Rent AI
projects.desc: Automated rent invoicing, payment tracking, and overdue alerts. AI reconciles bank credits with tenant ledgers.
projects.retention: Retains decade-long billing history and tenant relationship logs — no knowledge loss when staff rotates.

projects.name: Predict Maint
projects.desc: AI monitors elevator, HVAC, and plumbing sensor data to predict failures before they occur.
projects.retention: Preserves vendor performance data and building-specific maintenance patterns across staff changes.

projects.name: Lease Audit
projects.desc: Auto-review lease terms, flag non-compliant clauses, generate renewal recommendations.
projects.retention: Stores all historical lease negotiations and legal precedents permanently.

projects.name: Occupancy AI
projects.desc: Predict occupancy trends, optimize pricing, and identify buildings at risk of vacancy increases.
projects.retention: Maintains market analysis history and pricing optimization models.

projects.name: APPI Comply
projects.desc: Continuous monitoring of patient data handling against APPI regulations. Auto-generate compliance reports.
projects.retention: Maintains full audit trail and regulatory change history regardless of personnel turnover.

projects.name: Patient Flow
projects.desc: Optimize appointment scheduling, bed allocation, and resource utilization using predictive models.
projects.retention: Preserves scheduling patterns and patient flow insights across staff rotations.

projects.name: Tax Optimize
projects.desc: Multi-entity tax planning, depreciation scheduling, and cross-building expense optimization.
projects.retention: Retains decade-long tax filing history and optimization strategies permanently.

projects.name: Cash Forecast
projects.desc: ML-powered cash flow prediction across all properties with seasonal trend analysis.
projects.retention: Preserves forecast model tuning parameters and historical accuracy data.

projects.name: Labor Law
projects.desc: Monitor working hours, contract compliance, and labor law changes across all facilities.
projects.retention: Retains employee policy history and compliance records permanently.

projects.name: Workforce AI
projects.desc: Analyze staffing patterns, predict turnover risks, and optimize shift scheduling.
projects.retention: Preserves organizational knowledge and staffing analytics through staff transitions.

constitution.title: Enterprise Constitution & Culture Layer
constitution.desc: All agents operate within Japanese business culture: keigo protocol, seniority awareness, and respectful follow-ups.
constitution.roleRetention: 👤 Person leaves, position stays — Role Agents permanently retain institutional knowledge

slide7.title: From Desk to Data Center
slide7.subtitle: Start small, scale seamlessly — your data never leaves the building

stages.title: Personal AI
stages.subtitle: DGX Spark Desktop
stages.desc: Single desktop-class AI node for initial pilot. Perfect for testing with a small team before wider rollout.

stages.title: Team AI
stages.subtitle: 3–5 Node Cluster
stages.desc: Department-level cluster handling multi-modal AI processing — voice, document OCR, and real-time classification.

stages.title: Enterprise AI
stages.subtitle: H200 → Blackwell
stages.desc: Full enterprise compute center supporting all 11 buildings, RAG pipelines, and continuous model fine-tuning for 7,500+ personnel.

dataShield.title: Data Sovereignty Shield
points: All LLMs run on-premises — zero API calls to external clouds
Data encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3) within Japan
No training data exported — models fine-tuned locally on your hardware
APPI-compliant architecture verified from day one

slide7.upgradeNote: Zero downtime — same software stack, just more compute power. No vendor lock-in.

slide8.title: AI-Powered Rapid Delivery
slide8.subtitle: Full supply chain ERP in 1–2 months — AI replaces an entire traditional development team

wordCloud.title: One AI Replaces a Full Team

techStack.title: Modern Tech Stack
techStack.clickHint: Click a layer to see details

layers.name: Frontend
layers.detail: Server-side rendered React with responsive design, optimized for Japanese locales and senior-friendly accessibility standards.

layers.name: Backend
layers.detail: Serverless backend with edge computing for ultra-low latency. Auto-scales with zero DevOps overhead.

layers.name: Database
layers.detail: Real-time database with row-level security. Vector search enables semantic document retrieval across all enterprise data.

layers.name: AI Layer
layers.detail: On-premises LLM with retrieval augmented generation. Enterprise data stays local — fine-tuning runs on your own hardware.

layers.name: Deployment
layers.detail: Edge-first deployment with CDN coverage across Asia-Pacific. Docker containers for on-prem components.

esb.title: Enterprise Service Bus (ESB)
esb.subtitle: IBM-Grade Heterogeneous System Integration
esb.desc: The ESB acts as a universal translator between modern cloud-native systems and legacy enterprise infrastructure. It enables seamless data exchange across incompatible protocols, formats, and generations of technology — critical for interfacing with Japanese retail giants like Isetan.
capabilities: Message transformation: XML ↔ JSON ↔ EDI ↔ CSV
Protocol bridging: HTTP ↔ SFTP ↔ JCA ↔ SOAP
Service orchestration with retry, failover & dead-letter queues

strategy.title: Core Strategy: Business Leads, System Follows

steps.label: Business First
steps.desc: Ground every decision in real bean-trading workflows — origin sourcing, cupping scores, lot pricing. We never build in a vacuum.

steps.label: System Follows
steps.desc: Technology is shaped by field reality: roast profiles update the ERP schema; customs clearance triggers auto-invoicing. The system molds to the business, not vice versa.

steps.label: Grow Together
steps.desc: Expands new origins (Ethiopia, Guatemala), the platform absorbs new parameters with zero rework. Business and system evolve in lockstep.

strategy.tagline: ☕ From seed to cup, every byte follows every bean
